summary: Weekly Estate Readiness Digest feature testing complete - All backend and frontend features working correctly

issues: React key warning 'Encountered two children with the same key, /admin' - minor console warning, not user-facing

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/digest/preferences returns {weekly_digest: true} by default
BACKEND: PUT /api/digest/preferences toggles weekly_digest on/off correctly
BACKEND: POST /api/digest/send-weekly requires auth (401 without token)
BACKEND: POST /api/digest/send-weekly returns 403 for non-admin users (skipped - no benefactor token available)
BACKEND: POST /api/digest/send-weekly works for admin users (returns sent/skipped counts)
BACKEND: POST /api/digest/preview requires auth (401/403 without token)
BACKEND: POST /api/digest/preview works for admin (returns 400 'no estates' or success)
BACKEND: Weekly scheduler logs next Monday send time on startup ('Weekly digest scheduled for 2026-03-02T13:00:00+00:00')
FRONTEND: Settings page shows 'Weekly Estate Digest' toggle with data-testid='settings-weekly-digest-toggle'
FRONTEND: Settings page shows 'Send me a preview now' link for benefactors with data-testid='settings-digest-preview'
FRONTEND: Toggle successfully updates backend preference via PUT /api/digest/preferences
FRONTEND: webpack compiled successfully (verified in logs)
critical_code_review_comments: SettingsPage.js: The preview link conditionally shows only for benefactors (weeklyDigest && user?.role === 'benefactor') - this is correct behavior
AdminPage.js: React key warning 'Encountered two children with the same key, /admin' - should use unique keys for navigation tabs

benefactor_test_account.note: Created for testing weekly digest feature

seed_data_creation: Created benefactor user (digest.tester@carryon.com) for testing weekly digest toggle
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly digest feature fully implemented. Scheduler runs as asyncio background task, logs next Monday 8AM EST (13:00 UTC) send time on startup. Digest email uses Resend API (re_88Y814u4_Bkyod6FXAfeEj15ejdTtMYhn). Preview endpoint sends actual email. Use /api/auth/dev-login for testing to bypass OTP. Admin role does not see 'Send me a preview' link (by design - only benefactors see it).

weekly_digest_preview.notes: Sends actual email via Resend to user's email

settings_ui.preview_link_visibility: Only for benefactors with digest enabled
